title: rubus blandus
intro: Rubus blandus, also known as the American Dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The medicinal properties of Rubus blandus include its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and tannins, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of the plant are said to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and support the immune system. Rubus blandus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
